blockingIssues.description: The signed-in brainstorm modal is only a placeholder screen and does not provide actual library actions to start or reopen sessions, so auth success does not return users to the required usable library-first flow.

appliedUpdates.description: Expanded `.factory/library/environment.md` with the required brainstorm Firebase admin settings and Application Default Credentials fallback used by the backend foundation.
Documented that brainstorm auth uses checked-in public Firebase web config and relies on the standard local frontend origin for popup-auth validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Mention that mission startup may require running `.factory/init.sh` through `sh` when a checkout is missing the executable bit, instead of assuming direct execution always works.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `brainstorm-firebase-auth-foundation` handoff recorded a startup deviation because direct execution of `.factory/init.sh` failed and `sh .factory/init.sh` was needed to continue.
